officialSources.name: City of Boise High Impact Building Permits ArcGIS FeatureServer
officialSources.blocker: Layer exposes high-impact permit activity but not contractor/applicant/builder names in observed fields. Useful for market activity and address proof, not direct builder extraction.

officialSources.name: ArcGIS item search result: High Impact Building Permits
officialSources.blocker: Finds official feature service; contractor fields still absent from layer metadata.

provenanceNotes: Boise sprint recovered official permit activity source and source-backed public builder-site candidates. This is not as strong as Columbus/Pittsburgh/Hall because no permit source with builder names was confirmed within the sprint. Keep all rows as low/medium confidence buyer-validation candidates until official permit/license evidence or association directory evidence is attached.
nextAction: Find a Boise/Ada permit or licensing source that exposes contractor/applicant names, or use browser-rendered BCA SW Idaho directory/manual validation to raise candidates above website-only confidence.
